{"command":"cat > /tmp/fix_api.py << 'PY'
import re

with open('src/tools/position22_external_api.ts', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Fix config.api?.url -> config.API_URL
content = re.sub(r'config\.api\?\.url', 'config.API_URL', content)
content = re.sub(r"config\.api\?.authToken", 'config.API_KEY', content)

with open('src/tools/position22_external_api.ts', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print('Config references fixed.')
PY
python3 /tmp/fix_api.py && grep -n "config\." src/tools/position22_external_api.ts | head -10"}
